message:
feat: add Ollama as a fourth LLM provider for local model inference

Integrates the ollama-ai-provider package alongside OpenAI, Anthropic,
and Google to enable fully local LLM inference via Ollama. This removes
the hard requirement for cloud API keys when running AI-powered reflection.

Key changes:
- Add ollama-ai-provider dependency and wire it through the Vercel AI SDK
- Extend LLMProvider type to include "ollama" across types, config, and llm
- Ollama uses OLLAMA_BASE_URL env var (defaults to http://localhost:11434)
  instead of an API key; getApiKey() and validateApiKey() short-circuit
- getModel() creates an Ollama provider instance with /api suffix normalization
- Doctor command updated to show Ollama status and base URL in diagnostics
- Self-test LLM system check handles Ollama's base-URL-based availability
- Fallback order now includes Ollama as the last resort (default model: llama3.2:3b)
- All relevant error messages updated to mention OLLAMA_BASE_URL
- Test factory and test suite updated for the new provider

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -64,6 +64,7 @@ export function createTestConfig(overrides: Partial<Config> = {}): Config {
     embeddingModel: "Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2",
     verbose: false,
     jsonOutput: false,
+    ollamaBaseUrl: "http://localhost:11434",
     sanitization: {
       enabled: true,
       extraPatterns: [],
